title: FiraCode Font
body:
# FiraCode Font Pack

This simple resource pack replaces the vanilla minecraft font with FiraCode, a monospaced legible and modern font designed for programmers. All rights reserved to tonsky.

![Minecraft options menu with firacode font](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cce1ef6a3f1ed16103483ddd8824745390b480ee_0.webp)

FiraCode by tonsky: [Github](https://github.com/tonsky/FiraCode/tree/master)
